review_questions: Do inference records bind the P2-IMPL-01 failure-copy derived refs without leaving unresolved product choices?
Are canonical reasoning records source-explicit or deductive rather than inductive?
Does structural completion expose concrete Human Gate candidate options without adding child pages or secondary workflows?
Does every approved PRD clickable have exactly one reaction and matching graph edge coverage?
Do spec edge rows conserve source/target state, overlay linkage, no-product-expansion locks, and clickable trigger traces without treating field_input rows as click reactions?
Are graph edges outside the spec edge table limited to reaction-traced overlay decomposition or failure recovery paths with no hidden navigation?
Do validate, generate, retry, and save-draft failure paths include processing, timeout, duplicate-trigger, failure, retry, edit, close, and recovery-copy coverage?
Do split artifacts match the interaction graph payload?
Does interaction copy avoid adding new product scope?
